message:
feat(io): add read_line() convenience function for AsyncBufRead

Adds a cancel-safe read_line() free function matching the common
tokio::io::AsyncBufReadExt::read_line pattern:

  let mut line = String::new();
  let n = read_line(&mut reader, &mut line).await?;

- Reads until \n, strips \r before \n (CRLF handling)
- Returns byte count including newline (matching std::io::BufRead)
- Validates UTF-8 per chunk
- Cancel-safe: bytes already appended to buf remain on cancellation
- 7 unit tests covering basic, CRLF, EOF, empty, successive, bare
  newline, and invalid UTF-8 cases

Addresses #17 (partial - read_line was the one genuinely missing API)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
